content: GymSphere operates daily with early-morning and evening peak usage. Members should complete check-in/check-out through QR or assisted trainer flow.
Only members with active or grace-period subscriptions can enter through member check-in. Staff roles can enter without subscription validation.
Members can book personal sessions from the app. Trainers should confirm and track session outcomes. If members request help on floor, prioritize safety and form correction before intensity.
Monthly revenue is mainly driven by renewals and add-on PT bookings. Managers should watch upcoming expiries and idle members who have not visited in 14+ days.
Use hourly visit peaks to align trainer shifts and equipment maintenance windows. Keep peak-hour occupancy comfortable by adding floor support and deferring non-critical maintenance.
Always prioritize safety and proper form. Stop exercise if sharp pain, dizziness, or chest discomfort occurs. For diagnosis or medical concerns, direct users to licensed healthcare professionals.
